{
  "claims": [
    "The expansion of the 'Hire a Hero Tax Credit' through Assembly Bill 931 increases incentives for employers to connect veterans with quality, high-paying jobs.",
    "Over the past two years, county veterans services officers' work has generated $546 million in new or increased federal benefits for veterans, a return of $98 for every $1 invested.",
    "Assembly Bill 770 provides financial support for community colleges to update and expand remedial college courses to help first-year students succeed.",

    "The ABLE Act provides people with disabilities a path to employment and greater independence and dignity.",
